name: TalkingData
description: Chinese mobile data service platform providing analytics, attribution and audience targeting SDKs.

seo.title: TalkingData — Product Analytics
seo.meta_description: TalkingData: Chinese mobile data service platform providing analytics, attribution and audience targeting SDKs.

when_to_use: Mobile attribution SDK for Chinese app developers
Audience targeting via mobile data for Chinese market
Analytics SDK for iOS and Android in China
User behavior data for Chinese ad platform integration
Mobile analytics for Chinese gaming and e-commerce apps

pros: Broad mobile data coverage in China
Attribution, analytics, and audience in one SDK
Mature product with long track record
cons: Privacy posture scrutinized in some markets
Limited interest for Western SaaS teams
review.verdict: A veteran Chinese mobile data platform; useful only if you're actively shipping apps into the China market.
review.best_for: Chinese and cross-border apps needing local mobile analytics, attribution, and audience targeting.
review.not_for: Western SaaS, privacy-first brands, or anyone not distributing in China.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact sales — no explicit peak-lock evidence
